title: SystemArchitectureDocumentation
description: System Architecture documentation: title, short description, and flat list of sections (Overview, custom topics, then Components, Data flow, External dependencies, Design decisions, Deployment).

title.description: MUST be specific and detailed, NOT generic. Include the topic and repository context (e.g. 'System Architecture: Database Flow and Storage Handling (neurocode-python)' or 'Authentication and API Flow — my-api-repo'). Never use a generic title like 'System Architecture' or 'Architecture Overview' alone.

description.description: One short sentence summarizing the doc (for metadata).

sections.description: Sections in order: 1 = Overview, 2..N = custom sections from user prompt, then Components, Data flow & communication, External dependencies, Design decisions & conventions, Deployment & runtime. Each section has id, title, and full markdown description only.

description.description: Full markdown content for this section only. No subheadings (###). Use paragraphs, bullets or tables only where they add clarity. Escape newlines as \n.
